2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No. So false. Provide feedback: no description.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No. So false. Provide feedback: no structure.

Thus all false. Provide JSON array with objects. Each object: "question": "Chapters" etc. "feedback": ... "complies": false.
